testcase.name: test_tiered_within_first_tier
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:179: in test_tiered_within_first_tier result = calc_price(tiered_product["id"], {"users": 5}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:49: in calc_price assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Price calc failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Price calc failed: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_product_save_with_tiered_intake

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'internal' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc2ab85ba280>('pricing_type') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc2ab85ba280> = {'product': {'base_price': 50.0, 'bullets': [], 'bullets_included': None, 'card_bullets': None, ...}}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:243: in test_product_save_with_tiered_intake assert product.get("pricing_type") == "internal" E AssertionError: assert None == 'internal' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc2ab85ba280>('pricing_type') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc2ab85ba280> = {'product': {'base_price': 50.0, 'bullets': [], 'bullets_included': None, 'card_bullets': None, ...}}.get
